channel.title: Omni View - Balanced News Perspectives
channel.description: Daily balanced news summaries presenting multiple perspectives on the stories that matter. Countering media bias through diverse sources and critical analysis.
channel.itunes:author: Omni View
channel.itunes:summary: Daily balanced news summaries presenting multiple perspectives on the stories that matter. Countering media bias through diverse sources and critical analysis.

item.title: Omni View - Episode 29 - February 21, 2026
item.description:
# Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing **Date:** February 21, 2026
## Top stories (5) ### 1) Supreme Court rejects Trump's global tariffs **What happened (neutral):** The US Supreme Court ruled 6-3 that President Trump exceeded his authority by imposing sweeping tariffs under emergency powers, striking down many of the levies on trading partners. The decision leaves open questions about refunds for billions in collected duties, with estimates up to $175 billion potentially affected. Trump responded b...
item.itunes:summary:
# Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing **Date:** February 21, 2026
## Top stories (5) ### 1) Supreme Court rejects Trump's global tariffs **What happened (neutral):** The US Supreme Court ruled 6-3 that President Trump exceeded his authority by imposing sweeping tariffs under emergency powers, striking down many of the levies on trading partners. The decision leaves open questions about refunds for billions in collected duties, with estimates up to $175 billion potentially affected. Trump responded b...
item.itunes:title: Omni View - Episode 29 - February 21, 2026

item.title: Omni View - Episode 27 - February 19, 2026
item.description:
# Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing **Date:** February 19, 2026
## Top stories (5) ### 1) Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor arrested on suspicion of misconduct **What happened (neutral):** UK police arrested Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, King Charles' brother, on suspicion of misconduct in public office related to sharing confidential documents with Jeffrey Epstein. The arrest occurred at his Sandringham home, with searches conducted at properties in Berkshire and Norfolk. He remains in custody as investig...
item.itunes:summary:
# Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing **Date:** February 19, 2026
## Top stories (5) ### 1) Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor arrested on suspicion of misconduct **What happened (neutral):** UK police arrested Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, King Charles' brother, on suspicion of misconduct in public office related to sharing confidential documents with Jeffrey Epstein. The arrest occurred at his Sandringham home, with searches conducted at properties in Berkshire and Norfolk. He remains in custody as investig...
item.itunes:title: Omni View - Episode 27 - February 19, 2026

item.title: Omni View - Episode 25 - February 17, 2026
item.description:
# Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing **Date:** February 17, 2026
## Top stories (5) ### 1) Civil rights leader Jesse Jackson dies at 84 **What happened (neutral):** Jesse Jackson, a prominent civil rights activist, Baptist minister, and two-time Democratic presidential candidate, died peacefully at age 84, as confirmed by his family. Jackson, who marched alongside Martin Luther King Jr. and became a key figure in Black political power, had been living with progressive supranuclear palsy. His influe...
item.itunes:summary:
# Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing **Date:** February 17, 2026
## Top stories (5) ### 1) Civil rights leader Jesse Jackson dies at 84 **What happened (neutral):** Jesse Jackson, a prominent civil rights activist, Baptist minister, and two-time Democratic presidential candidate, died peacefully at age 84, as confirmed by his family. Jackson, who marched alongside Martin Luther King Jr. and became a key figure in Black political power, had been living with progressive supranuclear palsy. His influe...
item.itunes:title: Omni View - Episode 25 - February 17, 2026

item.title: Omni View - Episode 26 - February 18, 2026
item.description:
# Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing **Date:** February 18, 2026
## Top stories (5) ### 1) Ukraine-Russia peace talks described as difficult with no clear breakthrough **What happened (neutral):** Ukrainian and Russian negotiators met in Geneva for a second day of US-mediated talks, ending abruptly after about two hours with both sides calling the discussions "difficult" and "very tense." Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy accused Russia of dragging out negotiations, while also criticizing US ...
item.itunes:summary:
# Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing **Date:** February 18, 2026
## Top stories (5) ### 1) Ukraine-Russia peace talks described as difficult with no clear breakthrough **What happened (neutral):** Ukrainian and Russian negotiators met in Geneva for a second day of US-mediated talks, ending abruptly after about two hours with both sides calling the discussions "difficult" and "very tense." Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy accused Russia of dragging out negotiations, while also criticizing US ...
item.itunes:title: Omni View - Episode 26 - February 18, 2026

item.title: Omni View - Episode 28 - February 20, 2026
item.description:
# Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing **Date:** February 20, 2026
## Top stories (5) ### 1) Former UK Prince Arrested on Misconduct Charges **What happened (neutral):** Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, formerly Prince Andrew, was arrested by police on suspicion of misconduct in public office linked to his associations with Jeffrey Epstein, following a raid on his Sandringham home on his 66th birthday. He was held for 12 hours, during which he was photographed, fingerprinted, and had DNA samples taken bef...
item.itunes:summary:
# Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing **Date:** February 20, 2026
## Top stories (5) ### 1) Former UK Prince Arrested on Misconduct Charges **What happened (neutral):** Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, formerly Prince Andrew, was arrested by police on suspicion of misconduct in public office linked to his associations with Jeffrey Epstein, following a raid on his Sandringham home on his 66th birthday. He was held for 12 hours, during which he was photographed, fingerprinted, and had DNA samples taken bef...
item.itunes:title: Omni View - Episode 28 - February 20, 2026
